meta.title: Ostavica — self-storage in Podbara, Novi Sad
meta.description: Small, secure storage units in central Novi Sad. Heated, dry, monthly terms. From €45/mo.

hero.eyebrow: Now opening in Podbara · Novi Sad
hero.h1: Your storage room — a short walk from home
hero.sub: Small, secure units in central Novi Sad. Tires, boxes, a bike, furniture between moves — heated, dry, locked, access anytime.
hero.pricePin: From €45/mo · monthly terms · support in EN / RU / SR
hero.earlybird: First customers get 20% off the first month.

trust.title: Walk, don’t drive
trust.text: In a residential area near the centre.

trust.title: Heated & secure
trust.text: A heated unit on a gated site. Your own lock on the door.

trust.title: Monthly, no lock-in
trust.text: Rent for as long as you need.

trust.title: Your language
trust.text: Contract and support in EN / RU / SR.

fits.h2: Free up your balcony, hallway and trunk

items.title: Seasonal tires
items.text: A full set of wheels, off the balcony.

items.title: Boxes & belongings
items.text: Things you can’t toss but can’t fit.

items.title: Moving & furniture
items.text: A place for stuff between flats.

items.title: Pick a size
items.text: Not sure? Tell us what you’ve got and we’ll suggest one.

items.title: Reserve online
items.text: Two minutes. No payment to reserve.

items.title: Move in & lock up
items.text: Bring your things, add your own lock, keep the key.

sizes.h2: Pay only for the space you need

cards.desc: Tires and a few boxes. Size of a narrow wardrobe.
Boxes, belongings, a bike. Size of a big wardrobe.
A room’s worth of things, furniture when moving.

sizes.note: Cheaper with 3 / 6 / 12-month prepay. Cheaper than renting a bigger flat just for storage. Not sure on size? We’ll help.

space.h2: Clean, dry and easy to reach

why.h2: Convenient in ways edge-of-town storage can’t be

items.title: Right in your neighbourhood
items.text: Most storage sits on the edge of town. We’re where you live — on foot, no car, street-level, no lift.

items.title: Gated site
items.text: The unit is locked and stands on a secure, gated site — your things are safe.

items.title: Only you have the key
items.text: Your own padlock on the unit. We don’t go inside — access is yours alone.

items.title: Leave anytime
items.text: Moving out? Just take your things. No penalties, no long notice. One month is fine.

items.title: Pay however suits you
items.text: Cash, transfer or card. No Serbian bank account needed.

items.title: Heated & dry
items.text: Heated in winter and ventilated — not a damp basement. Your things stay in good shape.

items.title: Your language
items.text: Contract and help in EN / RU / SR. No Serbian bureaucracy — we’ll guide you.

items.title: Flexible on size
items.text: Need more room? Move to a bigger unit, hassle-free.

about.text: I’m Ilya. I moved to Novi Sad myself and know what it’s like when there’s no room for your things and hauling them to the edge of town isn’t an option. Ostavica isn’t an anonymous hangar — come by, we’ll meet and I’ll show you the space before you book. The contract is yours to keep.

items.q: Can I come and see it first?
items.a: Yes — visit before booking and we’ll show you the space and the units.

items.q: How do I pay? Do I need a Serbian account?
items.a: No. Cash, transfer or card — whatever suits you.

items.q: When can I access my things?
items.a: During working hours; access details confirmed when you book.
Just take your things. No penalties — the minimum term is one month.
The site is secured; you insure your own goods.
A heated, enclosed space on a gated site, with an individual lock on every unit.
No food, no flammables, nothing illegal.

reserve.sub: Opening soon. Leave a request — we’ll message you, answer questions and hold your early-bird discount. No commitment.

cookies.text: We use cookies and Yandex.Metrica to understand how you use the site. Analytics runs only with your consent.
